description_long: This is a mid-rise apartment building with a rectangular footprint, featuring seven stories and a flat roof. The facade is dominated by long, continuous balconies running the length of the building, separated by vertical columns and punctuated by regularly spaced windows. The exterior is primarily finished in white with subtle pinkish accents on the roofline, balcony edges, and structural columns. The building sits on a green base, suggesting a landscaped area or lawn surrounding it. The rear and side elevations are simpler, with fewer windows and no balconies, emphasizing the front as the main access and living area. The overall design is functional and modern, with a focus on symmetry and repetitive geometric forms.
description: A seven-story rectangular apartment building with long balconies, white facade, and pink accents, set on a green base. The design is modern and symmetrical, with prominent front-facing balconies and regular window placement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the building, continuous balconies, and the main facade with regular window and balcony arrangement.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the building's narrow depth, vertical columns, and the absence of balconies on this elevation.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain facade with minimal windows and no balconies, highlighting the building's structural simplicity.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the building's narrow profile and vertical structural elements.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are arranged in a highly regular, horizontal pattern, aligned with each floor and evenly spaced between vertical columns, creating a symmetrical and repetitive facade.
